title: Missed Tinkering
description: The combat and tinkering update added some cool things! This mod expands on the tinkering theme to provide some fun new redstone items.
body:
This mod adds 4 new redstone blocks while trying to maintain a vanilla feel.
- **The Pipe:**
  - Think of this block like half a hopper. It won't pull any items from the world or inventories above it, but any items in its inventory will get inserted into the block it's pointed to. Its a little cheaper, a little faster, and a little less laggy than it's older brother. 
  - ![The recipe for the pipe which is air, iron ingot, air, iron ingot, air, iron ingot, air, iron ingot, air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380bba142580030812595474778cc746cc331249.png)
- **The Filter:**
  - This is the other half of the hopper, it can pick up blocks from the world or inventories above it, but can't insert them into any adjacent inventories. However, this block has an extra inventory slot which determines which items it will pick up, regardless of whether that item is stackable! Normally, hoppers would not pull from this slot, but when the filter is supplied powered, this slot becomes available.
  - ![The recipe for the filter which is copper ingot, nether quartz, copper ingot, copper ingot, chest, copper ingot, air, copper ingot, air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd0d03e4e5fafdd1a27fcb38e5da694080d9a95.png) 
- **The Timer:**
  - This block contains an hourglass that can be filled with either sand, redstone dust, or glowstone dust. When the top runs out, the hourglass flips, letting off a redstone pulse. Note that glowstone will flow through the hourglass very quickly, while redstone will flow very slowly. When powered, this block will prevent the flow of any more items, pausing the timer.
  - ![The recipe for the timer which is copper ingot, glass, copper ingot, air, redstone torch, air, copper ingot, glass, copper ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb24ea927457eb3c1056cea580314b70f937ddb0.png) 
- **The Gear:**
  - When this block is powered, it spins, causing other gears next to it to spin as well. When spinning, the gear powers blocks nearby it. Be careful though, if you stack too many gears nearby each other, they may jam up.
  - ![The recipe for the gear which is copper ingot, copper ingot, copper ingot, copper ingot, redstone dust, copper ingot, copper ingot, copper ingot, copper ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b01ab7ef247273d09fadf1589d32853d16d7d5c9.png)
